title: cinnamomum fruticosum
intro: Cinnamomum fruticosum, also known as the Sri Lankan cinnamon or karu vembu, is a species of evergreen tree native to Sri Lanka, belonging to the family Lauraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cinnamomum fruticosum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Cinnamomum fruticosum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
